name: @unoverse-platform/gtm
description: Go-to-market nodes — Apollo.io & Hunter.io people/company search, enrichment and email verification
author: Gravity Team

nodes.name: Apollo People
nodes.description: Search contacts in Apollo.io by title, company, or filters

nodes.name: Apollo Company
nodes.description: Search companies in Apollo.io by domain, industry, or keywords

nodes.name: Apollo People Enrich
nodes.description: Enrich a person from email, name+company, or LinkedIn URL via Apollo.io

nodes.name: Apollo Company Enrich
nodes.description: Enrich company data with full Apollo.io profiles

nodes.name: Hunter Domain Search
nodes.description: Find all email addresses Hunter.io has for a domain or company

nodes.name: Hunter Email Finder
nodes.description: Find a person's email from name+domain or a LinkedIn profile

nodes.name: Hunter Email Verifier
nodes.description: Verify whether an email address is deliverable

nodes.name: Hunter Enrich
nodes.description: Enrich a person/company from an email, LinkedIn profile, or domain

nodes.name: Hunter Discover
nodes.description: Find target companies by industry, tech, size, location or query

features: Apollo.io person & company enrichment (incl. LinkedIn URL)
Hunter.io email finder from a LinkedIn profile
